title: TR18S: Valentine's Pokémon
body:
Welcome to TR18S: Valentine's Pokémon

In this pack you can find the following:

* Male Valentine Alt Bulbasaur
* Male Valentine Bulbasaur
* Female Valentine Alt Bulbasaur
* Female Valentine Bulbasaur
* Male Valentine Pikachu
* Male Valentine Eevee
* Female Valentine Eevee
* Female Valentine Pikachu

While not is all shown, and not many are added, a lot more are on the way.

The commands to get them is:

* pokespawn [Pokémon] [<valentine/valentine_alt>] [gender=<male/female>] [shiny=yes]
* pokegive [Pokémon] [<valentine/valentine_alt>] [gender=<male/female>] [shiny=yes]
* pokegiveother [username] [Pokémon] [<valentine/valentine_alt>] [gender=<male/female>] [shiny=yes]

If there is others you would like to see, please feel free to contact us on own discord.



[![discord](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/959791760706519050/embed.png?style=banner3)][discord]
---
[discord]: https://discord.gg/tWfYRpKNKW 'Discord'
